title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); manage models, chats, RAG, users in one place.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; sync/async, reactive, and Spring integrations.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; idiomatic Ruby with blocks and fibers.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and shell integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s UI and inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence options.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with recipes for function calling, fine-tuning, RAG, and edge deployment.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama and its CUDA/OpenCL accelerators; reproducible installs on NixOS.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger pipeline module that spins up Ollama in a container for CI-based LLM testing.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: Lightweight FastAPI wrapper exposing OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template using Ollama + Chroma for private RAG on PDFs and URLs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift Package Manager client for Ollama with async/await and Combine publishers.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Experimental Terraform provider to provision Ollama models and chat resources as code.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; small surface, generics, and native context cancellation.
